001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
005import androidx.room.Entity;
006import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
007import androidx.room.Index;
008import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
009import java.time.Instant;
010
011@Entity(
012    tableName = "pixel",
013    indices = {
014        @Index(value = "layer_id"),
015        @Index(value = {"layer_id", "x_coordinate", "y_coordinate"}, unique = true)
016    },
017    foreignKeys = {
018        @ForeignKey(
019            entity = Layer.class,
020            parentColumns = "layer_id",
021            childColumns = "layer_id",
022            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
023        )
024    }
025)
026public class Pixel {
027
028  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
029  @ColumnInfo(name = "pixel_id")
030  private long id;
031
032  @ColumnInfo(name = "layer_id")
033  private long layerId;
034
035  @ColumnInfo(name = "x_coordinate")
036  private int xCoordinate;
037
038  @ColumnInfo(name = "y_coordinate")
039  private int yCoordinate;
040
041  @ColumnInfo(name = "color_value")
042  private int colorValue;
043
044  @NonNull
045  @ColumnInfo(name = "last_modified")
046  private Instant lastModified = Instant.now();
047
048  public long getId() {
049    return id;
050  }
051
052  public void setId(long id) {
053    this.id = id;
054  }
055
056  public long getLayerId() {
057    return layerId;
058  }
059
060  public void setLayerId(long layerId) {
061    this.layerId = layerId;
062  }
063
064  public int getXCoordinate() {
065    return xCoordinate;
066  }
067
068  public void setXCoordinate(int xCoordinate) {
069    this.xCoordinate = xCoordinate;
070  }
071
072  public int getYCoordinate() {
073    return yCoordinate;
074  }
075
076  public void setYCoordinate(int yCoordinate) {
077    this.yCoordinate = yCoordinate;
078  }
079
080  public int getColorValue() {
081    return colorValue;
082  }
083
084  public void setColorValue(int colorValue) {
085    this.colorValue = colorValue;
086  }
087
088  @NonNull
089  public Instant getLastModified() {
090    return lastModified;
091  }
092
093  public void setLastModified(@NonNull Instant lastModified) {
094    this.lastModified = lastModified;
095  }
096}
